title: How to Choose Display Teams when Tagging
excerpt:
Hello there, I need to choose different display teams that show when you select “@” on updates.

posts.author: Tory_Schaff (Tory Schaff)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there, I need to choose different display teams that show when you select “@” on updates.

When we go to tag someone for an update, it’ll populate suggestions, however these have been leading to confusion. Instead of the options of “Everyone on this board”, “Everyone on this subitem” and “Everyone at your Foundation” I just need to display the curated Team that is actually in-house and not our entire network.

Thank you.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Tory,

I understand where you’re coming from here and will certainly relay this to our team internally. I am afraid at this time it isn’t possible to edit the default options that display when tagging in the updates section. You’re welcome to submit this as a feature request so that our wider community can vote on the request and get this on our roadmap
